stemHtml: ATC wants you to manually log on to the next ATSU after a failed transfer. What phraseology is used?

options.a: CPDLC WILL BE SHUTDOWN. DISCONNECT CPDLC. CONTINUE ON VOICE.
options.b: DISCONNECT CPDLC THEN LOGON TO [facility designation].
options.d: RESUME NORMAL CPDLC OPERATIONS. LOGON TO [facility designation].
